LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.0.description: I know this is not a haute cuisine restaurant, but it is terrible to eat the same thing every single day!
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.0.label: terrible food variety
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.1.description: We have a very varied and rich diet, it's amazing!
LanguageData.VCEV_NeedVariety.stages.1.label: amazing food variety
